arts.ttl: 'I'm in shock': Gabriel Agbonlahor absolutely stunned by what he's heard about Arsenal this evening
arts.sum: Aston Villa have been left reeling by Arsenal’s audacious bid for striker Ollie Watkins on Wednesday. TBR Football revealed on Wednesday that Aston Villa are furious...

arts.ttl: Neto endures NIGHTMARE Arsenal debut as he makes huge error to gift Girona the opening goal... and it's a former Tottenham player who scores!
arts.sum: Neto, making his first appearance for the Gunners at the age of 35 years and 194 days, was in in place of regular No 1 David Raya but the night was marked by a huge mistake from him.

arts.ttl: “Before the weekend” – Ben Jacobs shares interesting update on Arsenal’s pursuit of Ollie Watkins
arts.sum: Aston Villa’s January transfer window has taken a dramatic turn, with crucial decisions looming over the futures of both Jhon Duran and Ollie Watkins. With Arsenal ramping up their pursuit of Watkins and Al Nassr pushing to secure Duran, Villa find themselves at a pivotal crossroads. Jhon Duran’s move to Al Nassr to impact Watkins’ […] The post “Before the weekend” – Ben Jacobs shares interesting update on Arsenal’s pursuit of Ollie Watkins appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Champions League permutations explained as automatic spot eyed and opponents explained
arts.sum: However, even if Arsenal were to be fast-tracked to the last 16, the side could still face stiff opposition as ninth to 26th spots battle in an extra play-off round. Arsenal will travel to Spanish side Girona on Wednesday night to take part in their final Champions League league phase fixture in the competition's new-fangled format.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa make huge Ollie Watkins decision after Arsenal transfer approach
arts.sum: The 29-year-old, as an Arsenal supporter ever since he was young, is believed to be open to the move and that there should be no issues in agreeing personal terms with talks already advancing on the side of the player. While Emery faces decisions over Duran and Watkins, Villa are also interested in a move for Chelsea's Joao Felix.

arts.ttl: David Raya injury: Arsenal handed major new fitness concern before Man City showdown
arts.sum: Gunners goalkeeper travelled to Girona but “not fit” to play, according to Mikel Arteta

arts.ttl: Aston Villa left fuming by Arsenal's £60m Ollie Watkins bid as club make stance clear
arts.sum: Arsenal have launched a surprise £60million bid to sign striker Ollie Watkins from Aston Villa this month and the Midlands side have been left fuming by the timing of the approach

arts.ttl: Watkins to Arsenal: A dream transfer or Arteta's desperate gamble?
arts.sum: Ollie Watkins dreams of playing for Arsenal and Mikel Arteta is trying to help him realise this ambition. Aston Villa, of course, rejected the approach as they are simultaneously locked in negotiations with Al-Nassr over their other elite striker - Jhon Duran.

arts.ttl: Analysis: Where Arsenal v Man City will be won and lost
arts.sum: With Arsenal's right-sided central defender William Saliba likely to man-mark Erling Haaland, Timber must constantly be aware of Marmoush’s desire to make darting runs inside him. Man City's tactic worked against Chelsea, who encountered worrying 1v1s with Haaland throughout the final 70 minutes of that match; the Norwegian scored twice from those situations.

arts.ttl: Report: The advantage Tottenham actually have in race to sign 'special' £25m striker over Arsenal
